data.body:
AC amendment: Retired event file exclusion — The Python reducer's PRECONDITIONS scan must exclude files matching the '*-PRECONDITIONS*.retired' pattern (files renamed by _compact_preconditions() to mark them retired). Add acceptance criterion:
- [ ] Retired PRECONDITIONS events (.retired suffix) excluded from preconditions_summary computation
  Verify: Create a temp ticket dir with 1 live event and 1 '.retired' event; run ticket-show.sh; assert preconditions_summary reflects only 1 event (not 2)
